title: antirrhinum barrelieri var. genuinum
intro: Antirrhinum barrelieri var. genuinum, also known as the Garden Snorkel or Snorkkeln, is a variety of the Antirrhinum barrelieri plant, which belongs to the Plantaginaceae family of flowering plants. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, which have been used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Antirrhinum barrelieri var. genuinum include its ability to relieve respiratory congestion, soothe digestive issues, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal remedies.
